since_last: 54% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.14%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.16% · BTC -0.40% · Gold +0.06% · Nasdaq100 +0.54%. 54% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.14%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.14%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.75%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +5.35%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +5.35%, AMBA +4.62%, MDB +3.87%, MRVL +3.62%, BABA +3.39%. Laggards: ORCL -4.22%, AI -3.68%, ADBE -3.03%, RXRX -2.56%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.70% at $121.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.70% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
